description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsBeige bag with quilted front and buckle detailOne main compartmentInner separator and synthetic lining with zippered pocketsOne zippered pocket at backTwo short handles for carrying easeMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 22 cmWidth: 34 cmDepth: 15 cm
